name: tennis-stringing-site
description: Tennis Stringing & Racket Services - static site

scripts.build: npm run build:css && npm run build:js
scripts.dev: npm run build:css && npm run watch:css & browser-sync start --server --files 'css/bundle.css, js/bundle.js, *.html' --watch --no-notify --port 8080
scripts.dev:hard: node -e "console.clear(); console.log('Clearing sessionStorage...'); console.log('Starting dev server with hard refresh...')" && browser-sync start --server --files '.' --watch --no-notify --port 8080 --startPath '/?clear-splash=true'
